name: improve
description: >- Autonomous quality improvement loop. Scores a target against a rubric, selects the highest-leverage axis, attacks it, verifies, documents, and loops. No pre-planning between iterations — each loop re-scores from scratch.
author: SethGammon
summary_zh: 这是一个自主的质量优化循环，每次都从零评估目标并自动找出最关键的短板进行针对性改进，不断迭代直到达标，适合需要反复打磨、提升质量的场景。
